summary: 搭乘昭披耶河公船是探索曼谷的便宜且風景優美的方式。只需 40 泰銖即可享受河上美景，非常適合約會。還可以選擇購買 1 天無限次搭乘的通行證。

caption: Welcome to “A Local’s Guide to Thailand,” a column where we explore one travel philosophy through a Thai lens. Each month, we share an itinerary centred around one genre of travel and one destination.
